object_transcript: Bennett Valley Cal. | Sept. 8, 1876 | Dear True Friend Ettie, | Perhaps you know how glad I was to get your letter; but I scarcely think you do indeed words fail me when I would portran [portray] to you my great joy. for believe me I had not a word from this. until your epistle was handed me. except a few words in John’s letter from Libbie...
